summary: Iteration 2 scope fully defined: 3 user stories (event list filters with backend gap closure, clear filters, attendee profile navigation), explicit scope boundaries, 9 new Spanish localization keys, backend filter risk identified and scoped in, no external unknowns.

stories.title: Event list filters
stories.notes: Backend risk: GET /events and GET /events/upcoming do not forward filter params today. Scoped in as required work.

stories.title: Clear filters
stories.notes: State reset and empty state message switching logic.

stories.title: Attendee profile navigation
stories.notes: Read-only rider profile page; GetUserByIdUseCase likely already exists but may need verification.

artifacts.name: docs/handoffs/po.md
artifacts.content: Full PO scope for Iteration 2: 3 user stories, acceptance criteria, new localization keys, scope boundaries, risk mitigation.

artifacts.name: workflow/state.json
artifacts.content: Updated tasks and events for Iteration 2.

artifacts.name: .claude/skills/po-skill.md
artifacts.content: Change log appended with Iteration 2 PO phase completion.

qualityGates.name: required_artifacts_present
qualityGates.notes: All required artifacts created: po.md, po_scope.json (this contract), workflow/state.json updated, po-skill.md updated.

qualityGates.name: scope_defined
qualityGates.notes: 3 user stories fully scoped with 50 acceptance criteria. Backend filter gap identified and explicitly scoped in. Out-of-scope items documented. Ready for Architect phase.

qualityGates.name: risk_identification
qualityGates.notes: 1 risk identified: Event filter backend gap (GET /events and GET /events/upcoming do not forward params). Risk is scoped IN — backend agent will implement filter parameter forwarding. Mitigation documented.

qualityGates.name: localization_complete
qualityGates.notes: 9 new Spanish localization keys defined with English translations. ARB keys and values ready for `lib/l10n/app_es.arb`.

qualityGates.name: no_blockers
qualityGates.notes: No external dependencies, no missing information, no unknowns. Ready to proceed to Architect phase.
